summary: Stores and emits a signed integer control value.
description: Use Int for discrete numeric controls such as counts, selected indices, and integer mode values.
runtimeBehavior: in updates and emits, set updates silently, and bang emits the stored integer value without changing it.

ports.description: Updates the stored value and emits it.
Updates the stored value without emitting.
Emits the current stored value without changing it.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.

example.title: Trigger an integer value
example.description: Use bang to re-emit the current integer after a set event updates it silently.
